reviews.review_title: Duomo di Pisa: What a Masterpiece!
reviews.review_description: After have visited the Leaning Tower (another app in this bundle), I entered the Duomo, a masterpiece of Pisan / Tuscan Romanesque architecture. A nice option to see the noble edifice from tourist's point of view. I can well imagine that attending mass there via VR will be other possibility of a deep, total immersion for all senses, kinda spiritual immersion...
